title: "Best of Knysna & Plett" winners announced
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Over the past four...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Gallery","html":"Gallery"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Over the past four months, our readers have spoken and it gives us great pleasure to announce and congratulate the winners of the","html":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Over the past four months, our readers have spoken and it gives us great pleasure to announce and congratulate the winners of the"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"2024 Best of Knysna & Plett Readers’ Choice Awards!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Thank you to the people of Knysna and Plettenberg Bay – your nominations and votes for your favourite businesses in Knysna and Plett are the foundation of this project.","html":"Thank you to the people of Knysna and Plettenberg Bay – your nominations and votes for your favourite businesses in Knysna and Plett are the foundation of this project."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The overwhelming response and participation from our loyal readers, and the community’s shared excitement has reaffirmed what we believed could be an uplifting and enriching project for businesses in our beautiful town.","html":"The overwhelming response and participation from our loyal readers, and the community’s shared excitement has reaffirmed what we believed could be an uplifting and enriching project for businesses in our beautiful town."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"PHOTO GALLERY: 2024 Best of Knysna Plett Readers’ Choice Awards!","html":"PHOTO GALLERY: 2024 Best of Knysna Plett Readers’ Choice Awards!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Lots of respect to every nominated business, and a massive congratulations to each of our 2024 category winners – you make the Garden Route proud!","html":"Lots of respect to every nominated business, and a massive congratulations to
